response.original_title: How the Left Is Stealing Your Church
response.overview: It is no secret that America has entered a stifling new phase of political correctness. A new cultural orthodoxy created by Critical Race Theory, gender ideology, “social justice,“ radical environmentalism, and casual socialism, among others, now punishes dissent and silences Biblical truth. But these currents do not merely affect the culture, they are seeping into evangelical churches and organizations. Discover how the false "woke" gospel is undermining Biblical truth and threatening the church's proclamation of the Gospel in this compelling documentary by D. James Kennedy Ministries.
response.title: How the Left Is Stealing Your Church
